ideas.title: AI Webinar Campaign Planner
ideas.description: Automate webinar campaign planning, automated email generation, landing page copies, and scheduled social media posts using generative AI.
ideas.expectedBenefits: Reduces manual marketing orchestration overhead by 70% and enables 1-click campaign launches.

ideas.title: AI Partner Risk Detection
ideas.description: Analyze trading partner behavioral history, compliance updates, and automated news screening to flag high-risk business partners before manual auditing.
ideas.expectedBenefits: Real-time alert system to reduce legal and financial compliance risk exposure.

ideas.title: Smart CRM Segmentation
ideas.description: Utilize predictive customer behavioral models to dynamically segment clients and send target offers, improving active user retention.
ideas.expectedBenefits: Improve open-rates by 25% and overall retention of dormant users.

reviews.analysis: Excellent efficiency gains. Saving marketing managers several hours per campaign translates directly to direct cost reduction and faster time-to-market.
High feasibility. Generative templates for text are straightforward with established LLM libraries. APIs exist for standard social channels.
Significantly improves productivity for the marketing and growth teams, making it easier to orchestrate webinars.
Highly original application tailored perfectly to Deriv's frequent webinar campaigns.
Very strong business impact by protecting the firm from catastrophic compliance breaches or regulatory fines.
Moderate complexity but very doable with structured external data. Easy integration with internal audit tooling.
Improves compliance audit workflow. Cuts background research times from hours to seconds.
Transformational regulatory risk modeling using agentic news screening.

comments.comment: This is brilliant. We can integrate this directly with our monthly marketing plans.
Critical requirement. Compliance checks have been a bottleneck for our regional launches.
